description_long: This is a modern, twin-boom unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) with a slender, elongated fuselage and a high-aspect-ratio straight wing configuration. The aircraft features two prominent booms extending rearward from the main wing, each supporting a vertical stabilizer, forming an H-tail design. The landing gear is fixed and tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the booms and a single nose wheel under the forward fuselage. The cockpit area is forward-mounted and enclosed, with a streamlined canopy and visible window panels. The surface is predominantly light gray, with a smooth, hard finish typical of composite or metal-skinned UAVs.
description: A sleek, twin-boom UAV with a high straight wing, H-tail, and fixed tricycle landing gear, finished in light gray with a streamlined forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the forward cockpit, high straight wing, and both vertical stabilizers on the twin booms.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the H-tail configuration, twin booms, and fixed main landing gear under each boom.
description_view_2: Rear-right view emphasizing the symmetry of the twin booms, H-tail, and the main landing gear placement.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the forward cockpit, nose wheel, and the full span of the straight wing.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets, supported by twin booms.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engine or propeller; likely electric or pusher configuration not shown in detail.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers mounted on the ends of the booms and a horizontal stabilizer connecting them.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels under the booms and a single nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a streamlined canopy and visible window panels.
